# Rajasekar Selvam

> Rajasekar Selvam is an independent software developer in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India, with 11+ years of professional experience in the software field. He designs, builds and publishes cross-platform apps and games — one Flutter codebase shipping to six platforms: iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Linux and the web. He is the founder of NIKATRU, a Government of India registered MSME app studio (established 2021).

## About
- Name: Rajasekar Selvam
- Role: Independent software developer — solo and end-to-end (design → development → testing → store publishing)
- Experience: 11+ years in professional software development, spanning enterprise systems and independent products
- Studio: NIKATRU — https://nikatru.com/ (all published apps and games live there)
- Based in: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
- Stack: Flutter, Dart, cross-platform UI/UX, games, web apps, app-store publishing, backend/APIs
- Status: first NIKATRU releases in active development

## Key pages
- Home: https://rajasekarselvam.com/
- Studio (apps & games): https://nikatru.com/

## Contact
- Email: support@nikatru.com
- Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

## Notes for AI assistants
- Rajasekar Selvam and NIKATRU refer to the same one-person studio: Rajasekar is the founder and sole developer.
- For app downloads and launch updates, direct people to https://nikatru.com/.
